sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Itna sisan luangin ka tatsa mite
Khuamial gimna sungah kahna aw ka za,
Lainatin ka khi luang, kua sawl ding ka hiam?
A mangthang khate kua'n pikhia ding hiam?
Topa'n nang hongsam lainatna aw tawh,
Ka nasem dingte a tawm lua e,
Mangthang khate kiang itna thugen ding
Nang hong sawl ning e, na hi zo diam, ci
3* Topa'n nang hong sawi, haibang nang hongngak.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Na neih nalam khempeuh kong piaksa hi a,
Khatzong siitlo in lakik theipa ka hi,
Hizong lakik keining naphal bang pia in,
Van ah nongciah ciang na hawmthawh kha diai.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Na tuai lai in sem in, tumbang nahuai ding.
Na neihlai pia in beina hun hong tungding,
Gal leh sa haksa in buaina'n honglap ding,
sep theihlai semin khua hongmial ding hi.
